title: Resolve image loading issue in product browsing page

requirements.text: Fix the loading issue on the ProductBrowse page so that product images, gallery images (including the newly replaced image), and promotional sections load correctly without hanging spinners or timeout states. Ensure the LoadingTimeout component, useImageLoader hook retry logic, and any lazy-loading mechanisms work as expected for all image sections.
acceptanceCriteria: The ProductBrowse page loads all sections without displaying a stuck loading spinner
The LoadingTimeout component does not prematurely trigger the timeout alert under normal conditions
Images in SwipeableGallery, AttackOnTitanGallery, WatchProductSection, and MeeshoProductSection load correctly
The useImageLoader hook retries failed image loads and falls back to a placeholder without freezing the UI
No indefinite loading states remain visible after content has been fetched

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not alter the backend Motoko actor
nonGoals: Adding new product features or pages
Changing the visual design or color theme
